column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling brightly with blooming cherry blossoms" | TEXT="嬉しい限りです" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a beautiful sunset with a glow" | TEXT="感無量でございます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a celebratory fan open wide" | TEXT="吉報ですわ！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands with a joyful, airy expression" | TEXT="胸が躍りますわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Twirling around in her colorful kimono" | TEXT="至福のひとときです" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up at the sky with a radiant aura" | TEXT="夢のようでございます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing a grand feast to celebrate" | TEXT="おめでたいですわね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Winking with a playful, happy smile" | TEXT="うふふ、最高です" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking a victorious flower in her hair" | TEXT="勝ちどきを上げましょう"
